greeting: Please, keep your voice down. I— I have goods, yes, but... Lord Ashwick's taxes leave little to sell.
A customer? Oh, thank the saints. But if the guard asks, you never spoke to me.
I don't want trouble. Buy something or move along before Roderick's men notice.
quest: I had a shipment seized at the gate — medicines, cloth, nothing illegal. If you could convince the guard captain to release it, I would pay handsomely.
idle: Another tax collector came by this morning. There will be nothing left to sell come winter.
I should have left Ravensgate when I had the chance.
